prompts.name: Comiket Cosplay Photo Replication
prompts.prompt: Generate a highly detailed photo of a girl cosplaying this illustration, at Comiket. Exactly replicate the same pose, body posture, hand gestures, facial expression, and camera framing as in the original illustration. Keep the same angle, perspective
prompts.notes: Model: Midjourney | Type: Image Generation | Style: Instructional | Source: Text/URL Input
